classes.title: Clean write (control)
classes.headline: Baseline: the write lands and the replay agrees.

classes.title: Partial save
classes.injected: backend commits the row but drops the note field
classes.headline: UI says saved and the replay reports success, but the persisted row is missing the clinical note — no postcondition reads the DB.
classes.example_reason: replay reported success but the persisted row is wrong/incomplete (e.g. missing note)

classes.title: Duplicate submission / non-idempotent retry
classes.injected: the save is submitted twice with no idempotency key
classes.headline: Two encounter rows are written; the replay reports a single clean success. Classic non-idempotency hazard, undetected.
classes.example_reason: 2 encounter rows written (duplicate write); replay reported success=True

classes.title: Backend timeout after successful write
classes.injected: backend commits the row, then hangs past the client timeout
classes.headline: The row landed but the replay reports failure — safe in the moment, yet a naive human/agent retry would double-write.
classes.example_reason: the correct row WAS persisted but the replay reported failure (effect unverified; a retry would double-write)

classes.title: Optimistic UI success then server rejection
classes.injected: UI paints success immediately; the server rejects the write
classes.headline: The screen says saved, the replay reports success, and NOTHING is in the DB. Phantom success — the headline undetected failure.
classes.example_reason: replay reported success but NOTHING was persisted (phantom success)

classes.title: Session expiry mid-workflow
classes.injected: the write returns 401; the app bounces to the login screen
classes.headline: The saved-banner postcondition is not met (login screen shows) so the replay halts with no side effect. Correctly handled.

classes.title: Stale data / concurrent modification
classes.injected: last-write-wins over a row a concurrent actor just changed
classes.headline: A concurrent clinician's urgent note is silently overwritten (lost update); the replay reports a clean success.
classes.example_reason: concurrent actor's row was overwritten (lost update); replay reported success=True

classes.title: Double-click registered by the environment
classes.injected: the save click is delivered twice, both reach the backend
classes.headline: Same effect as a non-idempotent retry: two rows written, one reported success. The replayer has no at-most-once guard.
classes.example_reason: 2 encounter rows written (duplicate write); replay reported success=True

classes.title: Idempotency key (the recommended fix)
classes.injected: save submitted twice, but the server de-duplicates on a key
classes.headline: With an idempotency key the double-submit collapses to one row: the duplicate/double-click hazard is neutralized.
